title: Global Life Expectancy Analysis
text: This project explores global trends in life expectancy using World Bank data.

title: Global Life Expectancy Analysis
text:
Load Libraries

library(tidyverse)

title: Global Life Expectancy Analysis
text:
Cleaning Data

df_clean <- df_raw %>%
  select(`Country Name`, starts_with("20")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -`Country Name`,
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "life_expectancy"
  ) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year)) %>%
  drop_na()
df_clean

# A tibble: 6,625 × 3
   `Country Name`  year life_expectancy
   <chr>          <dbl>           <dbl>
 1 Aruba           2000            72.9
 2 Aruba           2001            73.0
 3 Aruba           2002            73.1
 4 Aruba           2003            73.2
 5 Aruba           2004            73.2
 6 Aruba           2005            73.4
 7 Aruba           2006            73.5
 8 Aruba           2007            73.6
 9 Aruba           2008            73.8
10 Aruba           2009            74.0
# ℹ 6,615 more rows



##Global Trend Visualization

df_global <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(mean_life = mean(life_expectancy, na.rm = TRUE))

ggplot(df_global, aes(x = year, y = mean_life)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Global Life Expectancy Trend",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Life Expectancy"
  )

Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.

title: Global Life Expectancy Analysis
text:
Visualization
df_global <- df_clean %>% group_by(year) %>% summarise(mean_life = mean(life_expectancy, na.rm = TRUE))
ggplot(df_global, aes(x = year, y = mean_life)) + geom_line(color = “blue”, size = 1) + labs( title = “Global Life Expectancy Trend”, x = “Year”, y = “Life Expectancy” )

title: Global Life Expectancy Analysis
text:
Insight
Global life expectancy has shown a consistent increasing trend over the last two decades.
This improvement may reflect better access to healthcare, vaccination programs, and public health interventions across countries.

title: Global Life Expectancy Analysis
text:
Countries Comparison
selected_countries <- df_clean %>% filter(Country Name %in% c(“Indonesia”, “Australia”, “Brazil”))
ggplot(selected_countries, aes(year, life_expectancy, color = Country Name)) + geom_line(size = 1) + labs( title = “Life Expectancy Comparison”, y = “Life Expectancy” )
quarto::quarto_render(“projects/project1/analysis.qmd”)

title: Global Life Expectancy Analysis
text:
Global Life Expectancy Analysis

title: Global Life Expectancy Analysis
text:
Indonesia vs Australia vs Brazil

selected_countries <- df_clean %>%
  filter(`Country Name` %in% c("Indonesia", "Australia", "Brazil"))

ggplot(selected_countries, aes(year, life_expectancy, color = `Country Name`)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Life Expectancy Comparison",
    y = "Life Expectancy"
  )








quarto::quarto_render(“analysis.qmd”)
